testcase.name: Error Classes > KaleidoError > should be the base error class
Error Classes > APIError > should extend KaleidoError
Error Classes > APIError > should include status code
Error Classes > NetworkError > should extend KaleidoError
Error Classes > ValidationError > should have correct code
Error Classes > NotFoundError > should have 404 status
Error Classes > TimeoutError > should have correct code
Error Classes > ConfigError > should have correct code
Error Classes > SwapError > should include swap ID
mapHttpError > should map 404 errors to NotFoundError
mapHttpError > should map 400 errors to ValidationError
mapHttpError > should map 500 errors to APIError
mapHttpError > should map 429 errors to RateLimitError
mapHttpError > should map timeout errors (408, 504)
mapHttpError > should use error message from data
mapHttpError > should fallback to statusText if no data
Type Definitions > Layer type > should include BTC layers
Type Definitions > Layer type > should include RGB layers
Type Definitions > KaleidoConfig type > should accept minimal config
Type Definitions > KaleidoConfig type > should accept full config
Integration Tests (Local API) > should list assets from real API
Integration Tests (Local API) > should list pairs from real API
Integration Tests (Local API) > should get quote from real API
Utility Functions > Amount Conversion > should convert BTC to satoshis correctly
Utility Functions > Amount Conversion > should convert satoshis to BTC correctly
Utility Functions > Amount Conversion > should handle USDT precision (6 decimals)
Utility Functions > BigInt handling > should handle large amounts as BigInt
Utility Functions > BigInt handling > should convert BigInt to number for display
Configuration > should validate required baseUrl
Configuration > should allow optional nodeUrl
Configuration > should use number types for timeout/retries
MakerClient Integration > Market Data > should list assets
MakerClient Integration > Market Data > should list trading pairs
MakerClient Integration > Quote Operations > should get quote by pair
MakerClient Integration > Pair Routes > should get routes for a pair by ticker
MakerClient Integration > Pair Routes > should discover market routes
MakerClient Integration > Atomic Swap Operations > should get swap node info
MakerClient Integration > Atomic Swap Operations > should init a swap
MakerClient Integration > Atomic Swap Operations > should get atomic swap status
MakerClient Integration > Order History & Analytics > should get order history with pagination
MakerClient Integration > Order History & Analytics > should get order analytics
MakerClient Integration > LSP Operations > should get LSP info
MakerClient Integration > LSP Operations > should get LSP network info
MakerClient Integration > Convenience Methods > should convert raw and display amounts
Trading Pairs and WebSocket Quotes Integration > Fetching Trading Pairs > should fetch all trading pairs
Trading Pairs and WebSocket Quotes Integration > Fetching Trading Pairs > should fetch pairs with BTC as base asset
Trading Pairs and WebSocket Quotes Integration > Fetching Trading Pairs > should fetch pairs with RGB assets
Trading Pairs and WebSocket Quotes Integration > Fetching Trading Pairs > should verify pairs have layer information in routes
Trading Pairs and WebSocket Quotes Integration > Fetching Trading Pairs > should filter pairs by layer
Trading Pairs and WebSocket Quotes Integration > WebSocket Quote Streaming > should stream quotes for BTC_LN to RGB_LN
testcase.system-err: Skipping - WebSocket server not available for BTC_LN to RGB_LN: Error: Connection closed before opening at /Users/unico/Dev/Kaleido/kaleidosdk/typescript-sdk/src/ws-client.ts:201:36 at settle (/Users/unico/Dev/Kaleido/kaleidosdk/typescript-sdk/src/ws-client.ts:145:17) at WebSocket.ws.onclose (/Users/unico/Dev/Kaleido/kaleidosdk/typescript-sdk/src/ws-client.ts:200:25) at WebSocket.[nodejs.internal.kHybridDispatch] (node:internal/event_target:843:20) at WebSocket.dispatchEvent (node:internal/event_target:776:26) at fireEvent (node:internal/deps/undici/undici:13343:14) at WebSocket.#onSocketClose (node:internal/deps/undici/undici:14601:9) at Object.onSocketClose (node:internal/deps/undici/undici:14301:72) at failWebsocketConnection (node:internal/deps/undici/undici:13761:17) at Object.processResponse (node:internal/deps/undici/undici:13664:15)

RLN Client Integration > Node Information & Identity > should get taker pubkey

RLN Client Integration > Channel Management > should handle empty channel list
RLN Client Integration > Channel Management > should open a channel

testcase.name: RLN Client Integration > Trade Operations > should fail to whitelist invalid swap string
RLN Client Integration > Error Handling > should handle node not configured error
RLN Client Integration > Error Handling > should handle network errors gracefully
RLN Client Integration > Error Handling > should preserve error details
RLN Client Integration > Type Safety > should return properly typed responses

testcase.name: WebSocket Integration > WebSocket Client Integration > should enable WebSocket
WebSocket Integration > WebSocket Client Integration > should have streaming methods
WebSocket Integration > WebSocket Client Integration > should stream real-time quotes
WebSocket Integration > Quote Streaming > should return unsubscribe function

testcase.name: WebSocket Integration > Quote Streaming > should throw error if WebSocket not enabled
Type Safety > Client Types > should have properly typed client
Type Safety > Response Types > should properly type API responses
Type Safety > Layer Enum > should accept valid layer values
Type Safety > openapi-fetch Type Integration > should have type-safe HTTP client
MakerClient Error Handling Reproduction > should default to APIError (500) if response is missing
MakerClient Error Handling Reproduction > should throw 400 if response object is present with status 400
Error Classes > KaleidoError should extend Error
Error Classes > should identify retryable errors
Error Classes > mapHttpError > should map 400 to ValidationError
Error Classes > mapHttpError > should map 404 to NotFoundError
Error Classes > mapHttpError > should map 429 to RateLimitError
Error Classes > mapHttpError > should map 408/504 to TimeoutError
Error Classes > mapHttpError > should map 500-503 to APIError
Error Classes > mapHttpError > should use error message from data
Error Classes > mapHttpError > should fallback to statusText if no data
HttpClient > Constructor > should create client with maker API
HttpClient > Constructor > should create client with node API when nodeUrl provided
HttpClient > Constructor > should not have node client without nodeUrl
HttpClient > Node Client > should throw error when accessing node without configuration
HttpClient > Node Client > should allow enabling node client later
MakerClient - Quote Methods > getQuote > should successfully get quote with from_amount specified
MakerClient - Quote Methods > getQuote > should successfully get quote with to_amount specified (reverse quote)
MakerClient - Quote Methods > getQuote > should handle API errors correctly
MakerClient - Quote Methods > getQuote > should handle different layer combinations
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Quote Validation > should throw ValidationError when amount is below minimum
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Quote Validation > should throw ValidationError when amount is above maximum
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Quote Validation > should throw ValidationError when both amounts are provided
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Quote Validation > should throw ValidationError when neither amount is provided
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Quote Validation > should throw ValidationError for invalid asset/layer combination
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Error Type Mapping > should map 400 status to ValidationError with correct properties
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Error Type Mapping > should map 404 status to NotFoundError
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Error Type Mapping > should map 422 status to ValidationError for missing fields
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Error Type Mapping > should map 503 status to APIError for service unavailable
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Message Extraction > should extract detail field from error response
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Message Extraction > should extract message field from error response
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Message Extraction > should handle FastAPI validation array format
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Error Handling - Message Extraction > should fall back to statusText when no error details available
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Precision Methods > should convert raw amounts to display amounts
MakerClient - Quote Methods > Precision Methods > should convert display amounts to raw amounts
Precision Utilities > toRawAmount > should convert BTC to satoshis (8 decimals)
Precision Utilities > toRawAmount > should convert USDT to atomic units (6 decimals)
Precision Utilities > toRawAmount > should handle precision 0
Precision Utilities > toDisplayAmount > should convert satoshis to BTC
Precision Utilities > toDisplayAmount > should convert USDT atomic to display
Precision Utilities > PrecisionHandler > should create handler from assets
Precision Utilities > PrecisionHandler > should throw error with empty assets array
Precision Utilities > PrecisionHandler > should convert amounts correctly
Precision Utilities > PrecisionHandler > should throw error for unknown asset
Precision Utilities > PrecisionHandler > should validate order sizes
Precision Utilities > PrecisionHandler > should format display amounts
Precision Utilities > PrecisionHandler > should get order size limits
WSClient > Connection Management > should create WSClient instance
WSClient > Connection Management > should preserve a client ID already embedded in the URL
WSClient > Connection Management > should append a generated client ID when URL ends at /ws
WSClient > Connection Management > should have event emitter methods
WSClient > Connection Management > should have requestQuote method
WSClient > Connection Management > should have ping method
WSClient > Message Handling > should handle quote response events
WSClient > Message Handling > should preserve quote action when handling wire messages
WSClient > Message Handling > should handle connection established event
WSClient > Message Handling > should handle pong events
WSClient > Error Handling > should emit error events
WSClient > Error Handling > should handle disconnection
WSClient > Error Handling > should emit reconnecting event
WSClient > Disconnection > should disconnect cleanly
